name: dreative
description: Product-first frontend design skill with concise planning, real-browser refinement, and deterministic delivery checks.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:ui
scripts.test:active: npm run build:server && node --test dist/shared/deliveryProfiles.test.js dist/shared/creativeCatalog.test.js dist/shared/preflight.test.js dist/cli/docsCheck.test.js dist/cli/finalize.test.js dist/cli/installSkill.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run build:server && node --test dist/shared/*.test.js dist/cli/*.test.js
scripts.docs-check: npm run build:server && node dist/cli/index.js docs-check
